content:
🚀 Just deployed my marketplace analytics dashboard! Built an interactive Streamlit app with 5 actionable business insights from real e-commerce data. The power of Python + Plotly for data storytelling never gets old.

#DataScience #Streamlit #Analytics #Python

💡 Key insight from my Telco Churn Prediction project: Feature engineering made the difference between 78% and 92% accuracy.

What worked:
• Encoding tenure into categorical buckets
• Creating interaction features between contract type and monthly charges
• Handling class imbalance with SMOTE

The Streamlit inference dashboard makes it easy for business teams to use the model directly.

#MachineLearning #ChurnPrediction #DataScience

📊 A/B Testing in E-Commerce: Just wrapped up an analysis optimizing recommendation systems using statistical hypothesis testing.

Results:
• 12% improvement in conversion rate with the new algorithm
• Used chi-squared tests and confidence intervals
• Sample size calculations were crucial for reliable results

Data-driven decisions > gut feelings, every time.

#ABTesting #Statistics #ECommerce #DataAnalytics

🎯 Building a Customer Retention Intelligence System from scratch.

The goal: predict which customers are likely to churn BEFORE they leave, and recommend personalized retention strategies.

Tech stack: Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, and a lot of domain knowledge from behavioral analytics.

Every dataset tells a story — you just have to ask the right questions.

#CustomerRetention #MachineLearning #Analytics

🏏 Fun project alert! Built a Power BI dashboard analyzing ICC T20 World Cup 2022 player performance.

Key metrics tracked:
• Batting strike rates and consistency
• Bowling economy and wicket-taking ability
• Fielding impact scores

Sports + Data = Endless possibilities! 📈

#DataVisualization #PowerBI #Cricket #SportsAnalytics

🔥 Credit Card Fraud Detection: Tackling one of the most challenging ML problems.

Why it's hard:
• Extreme class imbalance (fraud < 1% of transactions)
• Need for real-time prediction
• High cost of false negatives AND false positives

My approach: Ensemble methods + anomaly detection + careful threshold tuning.

#FraudDetection #MachineLearning #FinTech #DataScience
